key_items: Bitcoin mining stocks surge on AI infrastructure boom with major capacity expansions (TeraWulf 1GW Kentucky, Strive buying 1,109 BTC)
Corporate treasury demand accelerates as Strive reaches 16,500 BTC holdings and Smarter Web adds to positions
Liquidation hunting at $77K-78K range creating volatility but spot ETF demand weakness and $14B liquidation setup present downside risk
reasoning: Positive institutional adoption momentum from AI-infrastructure pivot and aggressive corporate Bitcoin accumulation by major holders (Strive, Smarter Web) offsets near-term technical weakness. However, weakening spot ETF demand, liquidation setup risk, and BTC unable to hold $78K suggest consolidation rather than strong uptrend in 1-7 day window.
risks: Leveraged long positions combined with $14 billion liquidation setup could trigger sharp flush to $75K-74K if liquidation hunts intensify and spot ETF inflows remain anemic.
